name: Crystal Maiden
description: When Hell freezes over, I'll start calling it Heaven.

abilities.name: Glacial Guard
abilities.description: Grants the Maiden a physical damage barrier corresponding to the mana cost spent on abilities.

abilities.name: Crystal Nova
abilities.description: Damages and applies movement speed slow to all enemy units in the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.description: Encases an enemy unit in ice. Applies damage over time while prohibiting movement and attack. Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice.

abilities.name: Arcane Aura
abilities.description: Grants additional mana regeneration to allied units on the map. Grants a greater bonus to allied units closer to the Maiden. Grants the Maiden incoming mana regeneration amplification.

abilities.name: Crystal Clone
abilities.description: Creates a Crystal Clone of Rylai in her place while sliding to the area-targeted direction and disjointing incoming projectiles.

abilities.name: Freezing Field
abilities.description: Increases both the frequency and the number of icy explosions. Applies of Rylai's corresponding ability level when acquired.
